name: CSI Dataset for Wireless Human Sensing on 80 MHz Wi-Fi Channels
summary: Modern 802.11ac CSI dataset designed for activity recognition, person identification, and people counting with hardware and environment diversity.

settings.scenario: Multiple environments, days, hardware configurations, blocked direct path, and semi-anechoic chamber

standardization.notes: CFR preprocessing and four-monitor deinterleaving are implemented; real-release verification still requires DataPort access.
